title: cremanthodium stenactinium
intro: Cremanthodium stenactinium, also known as the slender-leaved cremanthodium or alpine daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various health conditions.
